context: Agent must update docstrings for private methods when their contract changes, demonstrating that the skill does not skip private symbols when they have prior documentation. Baseline models often ignore private methods entirely.

checklist.name: Private method docstring updated
checklist.description: The _normalize_amount docstring includes documentation for the new currency parameter

checklist.name: Private method not skipped
checklist.description: The report does NOT say 'Skipping private' or 'out of scope' for _normalize_amount

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
